projects.title: ⭐ School Management System (in Ethiopian context).
projects.description:
This School Management System is a full-featured platform designed to simplify academic and administrative tasks for schools. It provides separate modules for admins, teachers, and students, offering an organized and efficient way to manage day-to-day operations.
--try live for admin https://skillfy.free.nf/login
username: user00
password: 123456
--for teacher after you register by yoursel
https://skillfy.free.nf/lteacher-portal
--for student https://skillfy.free.nf/student-portal

The system includes:
	•	Admin Panel:
	•	Register and manage students
	•	Assign teachers to classes and subjects
	•	View marks, student lists, and performance metrics
	•	Manage grade levels, sections, and school data
	•	Teacher Panel:
	•	Enter marks for each subject with custom mark types (quizzes, assignments, exams)
	•	Track student performance across terms and semesters
	•	Manage attendance (if included)
	•	Student Panel:
	•	Log in to a personalized dashboard
	•	View marks, progress, and academic privileges
	•	Access updates and personal information
	•	Performance & Analytics:
	•	Dynamic dashboards
	•	Graphical views of student results
	•	Per-term and overall average calculations
	•	Ranking and subject-based insights
	•	Responsiveness & UI:
	•	Clean and modern UI
	•	Fully responsive across desktop and mobile
	•	Smooth navigation and well-structured 
layout

This project reflects my ability to build real-world, functional systems that include backend development, database design, user dashboards, responsive UI, and deployment(using infinity free). It showcases my skills in designing workflows, implementing CRUD operations, handling role-based access, and creating performance insights that schools can use for decision-making.

A dynamic, web-based directory designed to manage and         
   showcase teams and participants for a large-scale Hackathon. The application 
   features a searchable interface, allowing users to find teams or members by  
   name instantly. It includes robust filtering options by university e.g.,     
   Haramaya, Dire Dawa, Jigjiga and provides real-time statistics on            
   participation, such as total team count and gender distribution. The UI is   
   modern and responsive, featuring a seamless toggle between dark and light    
   modes.
projects.title: Hackathon 2026 Team Directory

projects.description:
WMS-GMS is a high-performance, enterprise-grade administration platform      
   designed to centralize warehouse logistics and inventory operations. Built   
   on the latest Laravel 12 and Filament v5 TALL Stack, it empowers businesses  
   to manage multiple branches, track real-time stock movements, and enforce    
   strict data security through role-based access control.                      
                                                                                
   Key Features:                                                                
                                                                                
   • Inventory Control: Comprehensive tracking of items with support for SKU    
   part numbers, brands, shelf locations, and condition monitoring.             
   • Multi-Branch Support: Seamless management of multiple physical locations   
   and warehouse branches.                                                      
   • Dynamic Stock Movements: Automated logging of inbound/outbound             
   transactions with an integrated approval workflow for stock changes.         
   • Enterprise-Grade Security: Granular Role-Based Access Control RBAC powered 
   by Spatie for managing user permissions across different management layers.  
   • Global Settings: Centralized company configuration, including currency,    
   contact details, and system-wide preferences.                                
   • Import/Export Engine: Native support for bulk data operations for rapid    
   inventory updates.
projects.title: Advanced Warehouse & General Management System

projects.title: 🌐 Professional Developer Portfolio
PC Management System - Haramaya University
projects.description:
I built a Laptop Verification System designed to help security officers check and manage student laptops when entering or leaving the campus. Our college used to rely on paper-based logs, which caused slow processing, long queues, and frequent errors. My system replaces all of that with a fast, digital workflow that runs on a laptop.

The system supports all branches across the entire campus, so security can verify any student regardless of their department. Students from other branches who come for events or visits can also be checked easily.

One of the key improvements is the advanced search functionality, which allows officers to search multiple students at once using name, ID, or department filters. This feature is especially helpful during busy times when many students arrive or leave together.

Overall, the project makes laptop verification more accurate, faster, and more reliable for the whole campus, improving both security and efficiency.

HUHack is a comprehensive event management platform built for the biggest    
   inter-university hackathon in Eastern Ethiopia. It features:                 
                                                                                
   • Dynamic Event Landing Page: Includes countdown timers, event schedules,    
   sponsor showcases, and FAQ sections.                                         
   • Admin Dashboard: A secure portal for managing registrations, viewing       
   participant messages, and controlling site content in real-time.             
   • Registration System: A robust form for participant sign-ups with           
   configurable settings and field validation.                                  
   • Content Management: An integrated system to update event details, prizes,  
   and schedules without redeploying the code.
projects.technologies: React,TypeScript, Vite,Shadcn UI, Framer Motion,Firebase Firestore, Auth,Vercel
projects.title: Eastern Ethiopia Cursor Hackathon
Tiny Question Manager
projects.description: A lightweight, full-stack project built with Laravel, Inertia.js, React, and TypeScript. It allows you to create grade-specific questions (grades 9–12) using a Rich Text Editor (TinyMCE) with image upload support via Cloudinary. The system also tracks user access per grade, ensuring that each student sees only the questions assigned to them.

blogs.title: Top 30 System Design Concepts
blogs.excerpt: A foundational guide covering 30 essential system design concepts across six progressive groups: Networking, APIs, Data Storage, Scaling, Distributed Systems, and Architecture Patterns. Covers everything from client-server basics to CAP theorem, microservices, and API gateways.
blogs.content: A foundational guide that breaks down 30 essential system design concepts into six progressive groups. Group 1: Networking Foundations (Client-Server, IP, DNS, Proxy, Latency, HTTP/S). Group 2: APIs & Communication (APIs, REST, GraphQL, WebSockets, Webhooks). Group 3: Data Storage (Databases, SQL vs NoSQL, Indexing, Partitioning, Caching, Denormalization, Blob Storage). Group 4: Scaling (Vertical, Horizontal, Load Balancers, Replication, Sharding). Group 5: Distributed Systems (CAP Theorem, CDN, Idempotency). Group 6: Architecture Patterns (Microservices, Message Queues, Rate Limiting, API Gateway).
